repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

That's all. No extra lines. Provide exactly those three lines.

We must not include any extra text. The answer should be plain text. So we output exactly that.

Thus answer.

repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
